sourceWork.bibliographicScope: 先秦至隋; excludes 詩經 and 楚辭 from the main body
sourceWork.rightsNote: Use this as a collection index and provenance scaffold only. Public poem text must come from public-domain source witnesses such as Wikisource pages, older anthologies, or public scans.

sourceLookupOrder: zh Wikisource anthology or transclusion target lookup

notes: 詩經 and 楚辭 are separate classic families, not folded into this manifest body.
Expect many anonymous songs, sayings, and fragmentary verse; provenance review is mandatory.
漢樂府 and 古詩十九首 should be tagged as subfamilies before DB upsert.
Attribution-sensitive works such as 蔡琰 material remain review-first.
曹氏 and 建安 poets are good early validation targets.
阮籍 and 陶淵明 should be treated as anchor authors before long-tail expansion.
Use displayEraZh to avoid confusion with later 宋 dynasty collection targets.
謝朓 and 永明體 material need author and form tagging.
Largest block in the pre-Tang corpus; enter after first-pass parser proof.
Keep northern-dynasty provenance visible; do not merge under southern dynasties.
Small block; useful for testing low-volume era handling.
庾信-related material may cross southern and northern dynasty contexts.
Late southern-dynasty material should stay separate from Sui transition records.
Tang-adjacent works require boundary review before public display.
